title: Totem Spongebob
body:
🍍 Golden Spongebob Totem
Ever felt like the standard Totem of Undying was a bit too... boring? Bring some nautical nonsense to your Minecraft world with the Golden Spongebob Totem!

This resource pack replaces the default Totem of Undying texture with a high-quality, golden-themed Spongebob Squarepants. Now, when you're about to face a certain doom, everyone's favorite sponge will be there to save your life!

✨ Features:
Custom Texture: A unique, pixel-perfect Spongebob designed to fit the Minecraft aesthetic.

Golden Vibes: Kept the iconic totem colors but with the unmistakable face of Spongebob.

Lightweight: Only changes one texture, so it won't lag your game or clash with other packs.
